summary: Iteration 269: Session Management Bug Fix Testing Complete. All 21 backend pytest tests passed (100%). All 6 frontend Playwright tests passed. Verified: 1) Session creation includes last_seen_at field, 2) GET /api/auth/me updates last_seen_at on each call, 3) Expired session returns 401 with 'Sessione scaduta' message, 4) Valid session returns user data correctly, 5) Max 5 sessions per user policy implemented (oldest deleted, not all), 6) Session auto-renewal when < 2 days to expiry works correctly, 7) FIC 401 errors are mapped to HTTP 502 (not 401), 8) Frontend ProtectedRoute shows 'Sessione scaduta' screen when sessionExpired=true, 9) Frontend does NOT show empty data lists on auth error, 10) Frontend apiRequest tags 401 errors with isAuthError=true, 11) Health check runs every 3 minutes.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend security.py correctly implements MAX_SESSIONS = 5 policy (line 140)
Backend verify_session correctly updates last_seen_at on every call (line 271)
Backend verify_session correctly auto-renews sessions with < 2 days remaining (lines 269-276)
Backend invoices.py correctly maps FIC 401 to HTTP 502 (lines 1549-1556)
Frontend utils.js correctly tags 401 errors with isAuthError=true (line 91)
Frontend AuthContext.js correctly registers onAuthExpired callback (lines 47-55)
Frontend AuthContext.js correctly implements 3-minute health check (lines 68-84)
Frontend ProtectedRoute.js correctly shows 'Sessione scaduta' screen (lines 38-63)
Frontend ProtectedRoute.js uses sessionStorage to survive component remounts (line 16)

success_rate.backend: 100% (21/21 pytest tests passed + 8/8 unit tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Created test sessions in user_sessions collection for user_97c773827822/ten_1cf1a865bf20 during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session management bug fix fully implemented and tested. Key changes: 1) Max 5 sessions per user (not deleting all on login), 2) Auto-renewal when < 2 days to expiry, 3) last_seen_at tracking, 4) Centralized 401 handling in frontend, 5) 'Sessione scaduta' screen instead of empty data, 6) FIC errors mapped to 502 not 401, 7) Health check every 3 minutes.
